notes.ids: frozen Routes universe: baseline gear + craft materials + dump categories crafting, consumables, mounts, farming (tier 2+)
notes.w: item weight in kg keyed by BASE uniquename (strip @N first); enchanting never changes weight
notes.meta: {cat, sub, tier, ench} only for ids missing from baseline.json (gear metadata lives there)
notes.rebuild: patch-only, like recipes.json; prices live in routes.json (build_routes.py, 2x/day)
